prompt: Build a small full-stack web application called TrendSight that ingests a list of news headlines and groups them into thematic categories. The app exposes a REST API where users can POST a batch of article objects (title, description, source) and receive back a structured response with categories, each containing a name, a one-paragraph summary, and the articles assigned to it. A minimal web dashboard lets users paste raw headlines, trigger the categorization, and browse the grouped results. Categories must be generated by an LLM (GPT-4o-mini). The data model should persist past categorization runs so users can compare how topics shift over time.

features: POST /categorize endpoint — accepts list of articles, returns grouped categories
GET /runs endpoint — list all past categorization runs
GET /runs/:id endpoint — retrieve a specific run with full category detail
minimal web dashboard — paste headlines, view grouped results, browse history
build_spec.notes: This job is a representative output from the Agent 5 pipeline. The prompt is intentionally self-contained so JacCoder can build it without additional context.
